positive: A symmetrical, intricate circular mandala featuring celestial elements and stylized botanical life. The style is highly detailed, Neo-Art Deco engraving meets cosmic illustration. The main subject is a central floral nexus composed of glowing, stylized leaves and vines, perfectly integrated with swirling nebulae and geometric stars. Use a deep sapphire blue and midnight black background, sharply contrasted with metallic gold filigree and glowing emerald green bioluminescence. The composition must be centralized, repeating, and utilize strong, crisp silhouettes and clean outlines, perfect for a seamless textile print. Highly symmetrical, luxurious, mystical, zentangle style.
